qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Authenticated formula validation allows Twig-based memory exhaustion
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding targets `POST /actions/commerce/formulas/validate-formula` and Twig memory exhaustion in `FormulasController` and `Formulas::evaluateFormula()`, not the advisory's `TotalRevenue` widget `type` setting flowing into `craft\\commerce\\stats\\TotalRevenue::getData()` and the downstream queue/deserialization RCE chain.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory's vulnerable `TotalRevenue` widget setting flowing into the SQL expression in `craft\\commerce\\stats\\TotalRevenue::getData()` or the associated queue/deserialization execution chain.
evidence: The advisory fix `6d2d24b3a2b0c06593856d05446f82bd8af92d72` adds validation for `src/widgets/TotalRevenue.php::$type`, and the vulnerable `src/stats/TotalRevenue.php` path interpolates that setting into `sprintf('SUM([[%s]]) as revenue', $this->type)`.
The run manifest lists only one final `qualifying_vuln` finding for this session: `formula_validation_twig_dos`.

`formula_validation_twig_dos` instead targets `POST /actions/commerce/formulas/validate-formula` and Twig `range()`-driven memory exhaustion in `src/controllers/FormulasController.php` and `src/services/Formulas.php`.

The advisory's queue/RCE chain relies on `vendor/yiisoft/yii2-queue/src/serializers/PhpSerializer.php`, `vendor/craftcms/cms/src/controllers/QueueController.php`, and `vendor/guzzlehttp/guzzle/src/Cookie/FileCookieJar.php`, none of which the qualifying finding reaches.
